title: cheilanthes integerrima
intro: Cheilanthes integerrima, also known as the entire-leaved rock fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cheilanthes integerrima include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Cheilanthes integerrima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
